name: mat2P_silent_cassette
description: Silent storage cassette mat2-P on S. pombe chromosome II. ~2.1 kb donor cassette carrying P (plus) information, located ~15 kb centromere-proximal to mat1. Silenced by Clr4-H3K9me-Swi6 heterochromatin (mat heterochromatic island).
expected_copy_count: 3 cassettes total (mat1 active + mat2-P + mat3-M silent), all on chrII
